encounters.chief_complaint: Sudden severe headache, vomiting, altered consciousness

orders.display_name: BP_management: Target SBP < 140 mmHg per AHA/ASA guidelines
DVT_prophylaxis: Pneumatic compression devices (SCDs) — delay pharmacologic prophylaxis 24-48h
seizure_prophylaxis: Not routine; only if seizure occurs
Hypertonic Saline 23.4% 30mL IV over 15min via central line
